english_news.title: Watch: Trump will swear in Kevin Warsh as Fed chair as he seeks interest rate cuts
english_news.summary: Despite President Donald Trump's demands for lower interest rates, markets are betting the Fed will stay on hold through most, if not all, of 2026.

english_news.title: Trump defends DOJ fund after Senate Republicans push back
english_news.summary: President Trump droppped his $10 billion lawsuit against the IRS in exchange for the DOJ creating a $1.8 billion fund to compensate alleged "lawfare" victims.

english_news.title: Despite murky legal landscape, companies are undeterred in their prediction market investments
english_news.summary: Companies reiterated plans to growing their prediction markets businesses in recent earnings calls even as a regulatory debate continues.

english_news.title: Trump said he'd 'remember' companies that didn't apply for tariff refunds. Many of them are anyway
english_news.summary: Walmart confirmed to CNBC it has sought a tariff refund and plans to use any money it receives back to invest in lower prices for shoppers.

english_news.title: U.S., Iran signal peace progress — but remain at odds over enriched uranium, Strait of Hormuz tolls
english_news.summary: U.S. Secretary of State Marco Rubio on Thursday said there were "good signs" that an agreement to end the Middle East conflict is in sight.

english_news.title: Which company will the U.S. government take a stake in next? Here’s what traders think
english_news.summary: After new stakes in quantum companies were revealed, traders on prediction market platform Kalshi think IonQ, Micron and Anduril could be next.

english_news.title: Surge in 'risk-free' treasury yields sends bond investors in search of better opportunities
english_news.summary: Treasury yield surge shows bond market is not 'risk free' after all, but there's opportunity for fixed-income investors in intermediates, BBBs and high yield.

english_news.title: Iran war leaves U.S. gas prices at highest levels in nearly four years ahead of Memorial Day
english_news.summary: Global oil inventories are declining fast with just four to six weeks until gasoline, diesel and jet fuel prices shoot higher, analysts said.

english_news.title: Ebola risk raised to 'very high' in DR Congo
english_news.summary: The head of the UN health agency says the risk in the wider region is "high", but it remains "low" at the global level.

english_news.title: Rubio tries to reassure Nato allies over US troop deployments
english_news.summary: President Donald Trump says he wants to send more troops to Poland, a week after his officials cancelled a similar deployment.

english_news.title: Cubans grapple with fuel shortages and blackouts as US steps up pressure
english_news.summary: The BBC speaks to Havana residents after the US charges the country's former leader, Raúl Castro, with murder.

english_news.title: UK scientists developing Ebola vaccine that could be ready for trials in months
english_news.summary: The rare species of Ebola involved - known as Bundibugyo - kills around a third of those infected and has no proven vaccine yet.

english_news.title: US navy chief says $14bn arms sale to Taiwan paused due to Iran war
english_news.summary: Hung Cao told a Senate hearing they were "doing a pause" on the sale to make sure they had munitions for the Iran war.

english_news.title: Turkish opposition fights court ousting of leaders in ruling boosting Erdoğan
english_news.summary: The appeal court declared Özgür Özel's party leadership victory void, further cementing the president's grip on power.

english_news.title: AI used to fake evidence that ended Korean actor's career, say police
english_news.summary: Police are seeking an arrest warrant for a YouTuber who allegedly fabricated evidence to defame actor Kim Soo-hyun.

english_news.title: Alberta to hold referendum on whether to remain in Canada
english_news.summary: Voters in the western province will decide next October whether they want to stay in Canada or move ahead with a process for a binding independence referendum.

chinese_news.title: 新鲜零食品牌「金粒门」加速全国化：粤鄂6店同装｜最前线
chinese_news.summary:
新鲜零食品牌争相竞逐新市场。

36氪获悉，新鲜零食品牌「金粒门」近期密集落地全国布局，正式开启跨区域快速发展阶段。近日，金粒门华南首店、湖北首批合计6家门店已经进场装修。与此同时，金粒门华东首店将于5月29日正式入驻南京新街口IFCX，持续布局长三角核心市场。

金粒门相关负责人表示，金粒门将持续加码门店布局，年内将全力推进拓店计划，让更多消费者体验到新鲜短保零食产品与服务。

金粒门华南首店位于深圳龙岗布吉万象汇负一层

chinese_news.title: 氪星晚报｜优步与印度JSW集团达成协议，合作在印度开发及部署电动汽车；英伟达、AMD、英特尔参投，AI初创公司Hark完成7亿美元融资；神舟二十三号发射在即，各系统准备就绪
chinese_news.summary:
大公司：

Jefferies预计7-Eleven日本业务营业利润将达2270亿日元，本财年同店销售增长势头强劲

投行杰富瑞（Jefferies）分析师栗山俊介在最新发布的研究报告中指出，凭借在现做食品领域的拓展及有效的营销策略，日本零售巨头零售集团7&I控股（Seven & i Holdings）旗下的日本7-Eleven便利店本财年同店销售额有望实现稳步增长。报告预测，7&I控股国内便利店业务在本财年的营业利润将达到2270亿日元，且在下一财年有望继续增长4.8%。（新浪财经）

chinese_news.title: AI时代核心终端生态定位与用户需求洞察| 2026AI Partner·北京亦庄AI+产业大会
chinese_news.summary:
AI不是某一个超级单品的故事，而是一个多端协同的生态故事，消费者的期待与顾虑，正在定义这个生态的进化方向。

AI与硬件的融合分为四个阶段，当前正处于从深度融合走向生态化的关键节点。AI渗透率在手机端已从15%涨到40%，但仍是“加分项”而非“决策项”。未来，AI硬件生态的四个步骤——感知、记忆、决策、行动，或将分别由眼镜、手机、PC协同完成。

以下为演讲内容，经36氪整理编辑：

赵晓鹏丨NIQ G

chinese_news.title: 江行智能：从感知环境到改变世界：物理AI的机遇、路径与实践| 2026AI Partner·北京亦庄AI+产业大会
chinese_news.summary:
中国工业物理AI的真正优势不在模型参数，而在全球12倍的工业机器人部署密度、两倍的发电量和密集的5G边缘节点——场景密度、基建底座和开源模型的合力，正在推动物理AI从实验室走向规模化落地。

江行智能提出工业物理AI的三层模型，这套系统已在新能源场站和电网巡检场景落地——覆盖贵州、内蒙古等多地，核心算法准确率达99%。陈龙特别指出，工业场景下一个看似简单的巡检任务通常需要拆成100到200个子任务，这对AI的稳定性和可靠性提出了远超消费级应用的要求。

以下为演讲内容，经36氪整理编辑：

chinese_news.title: 小米YU7家族再推新车，雷军：标准版打特斯拉，GT版狙BBA
chinese_news.summary:
5月21日晚，小米正式发布YU7系列两款全新车型：标准版起售价23.35万元，GT版起售价38.99万元。至此，YU7车系已扩展至5款车型，价格区间覆盖23.35万元至38.99万元。

YU7是小米于2025年6月推出的首款SUV，上市当晚3分钟内大定订单突破20万辆。发布会上，雷军展示了YU7与特斯拉Model Y的销量对比：2025年7月至2026年4月，YU7累计交付23.2万辆，Model Y则为35.8万辆。

从月度交付表现看，今年1月YU7交付37869辆，成为中国汽车市场全品类销量冠军。然而，随着市场竞争加剧，YU7近几个月的交付量有所回落。

在小米的调研中，特斯拉Model Y的订单中约70%为续航593公里的后驱标准版。对许多用户而言，500-600公里续航已足够日常通勤，且特斯拉的五年免息政策吸引力显著，有用户直言该政策相当于直接减免2万元。

雷军坦言，YU7项目初期便规划了类似的后驱标准版车型。“说实话，当时我们认为产品线过于复杂，因此从4款减为3款，砍掉了标准版，这对Y

chinese_news.title: 让智能体看见世界：CV × AI Agent 的行业场景新实践| 2026AI Partner·北京亦庄AI+产业大会
chinese_news.summary:
让智能体“看见”世界，不是给它装上摄像头那么简单。当CV遇上AI Agent，乘数效应正在发生。AI Agent不等于Chatbot，真正的价值在于静默看护与自主决策。

AI进入产业腹地仍面临两大鸿沟：视觉认知与行业的理解。为此，大华股份构建了星汉大模型系列——V系列视觉大模型让系统“看得懂”物理世界，L系列行业模型打通业务逻辑。未来“基模+行业Know-how”将成为新范式，而AI的终局不是刷榜，是让每个行业、每个个体都不掉队。

以下为大华股份研发中心副总裁 周文凯 演讲内容，经36氪整理编辑：

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Kevin Warsh cut the federal funds rate before December 31, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Warsh takes Fed chair role amid Trump's explicit rate-cut demands, but market pricing shows 2026 holds — sharp divergence between political pressure and market expectations creates arbitrage.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC: 'Trump will swear in Kevin Warsh as Fed chair as he seeks interest rate cuts' + CoinDesk: 'Bitcoin continues holding pattern near $77,000 ahead of Kevin Warsh taking over at Fed'

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will U.S.-Iran nuclear agreement be reached and announced by June 30, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Rubio signals 'good signs' for Middle East peace accord, but uranium enrichment and Strait tolls remain unresolved — oil markets and geopolitical risk premiums hinge on resolution clarity.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC: 'U.S., Iran signal peace progress — but remain at odds over enriched uranium, Strait of Hormuz tolls'

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will the U.S. government take an equity stake in Micron (MU) by December 31, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Traders on Kalshi already betting on IonQ, Micron, Anduril as next government stake targets after quantum reveals; Micron's strategic criticality in memory supply chain and Trump's semiconductor nationalism make this live.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC: 'Which company will the U.S. government take a stake in next? Here's what traders think'

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will WTI crude oil average above $90/bbl in June 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Iran tensions + declining global inventories ('four to six weeks' until price spike) + Memorial Day gas-price surge signal near-term oil strength; ICE/OKX oil futures launch broadens retail betting access.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC: 'Iran war leaves U.S. gas prices at highest levels in nearly four years' + CoinDesk: 'OKX and ICE are bringing never-expiring oil futures to 120 million crypto users'

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Alberta hold a binding independence referendum by October 31, 2027?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Referendum on whether to remain in Canada scheduled for October 2026, with binding independence vote to follow if yes — growing separatist sentiment and geopolitical fragmentation thematic.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: BBC World: 'Alberta to hold referendum on whether to remain in Canada'

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Bitcoin trade above $100,000 at any point before December 31, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: CoinMarketCap or Coinbase daily OHLC; resolves YES if spot price touches $100k on any regulated exchange.
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Current Trump administration crypto-friendly stance, Warsh Fed pivot narrative, and tech IPO supply boom (Tom Lee thesis) create upside optionality; most market prices assume structural headwinds.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CoinDesk: 'Tom Lee says trillions in tech IPO supply won't crash the S&P 500' + BTC holding $77k despite geopolitical turmoil.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Ethereum's network revenue (base + L2 sequencing fees) exceed $5 billion annualized by June 30, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Messari, The Block, or Ethereum Foundation official reporting; sum of Layer 1 + rollup sequencer revenue annualized as of Q2 2026.
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: DeFi hack narratives (THORChain, institutional confidence) depress valuations despite rising throughput; Ethereum's rollup ecosystem growing but revenue models underpriced in ETH sentiment.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: Cointelegraph: 'DeFi hacks shake institutional confidence as risks outpace yields' — creating capitulation entry for infrastructure plays.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will the S&P 500 close above 6,500 on December 31, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: S&P Dow Jones Indices official closing price; any primary market data provider.
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Tech IPO supply (SpaceX, others) and Treasury repricing risk are priced as headwinds, but Warsh/Trump stimulus narrative, tariff-refund demand boosts (Walmart case), and AI infrastructure rollout create positive surprises.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CNBC: 'Tom Lee says trillions in tech IPO supply won't crash the S&P 500' + 'Surge in risk-free treasury yields sends bond investors in search of better opportunities' (BBB/HY spreads widening = risk appetite).

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Xiaomi (ticker: 1810.HK or XIACF) deliver more than 800,000 vehicles by December 31, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Xiaomi official delivery reports or Hong Kong stock exchange filings; cumulative YU7 + other model sales.
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: YU7 launched June 2025 with 20M pre-orders in 3 minutes; 2025-2026 deliveries already ramping (per 36Kr 36Kr). Market underestimates China EV demand resilience and Lei Jun's execution.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: 36Kr: 'Xiaomi YU7 family pushes new models; Lei Jun: standard targets Tesla, GT targets BBA' + YU7 vs Model Y cumulative sales comparison showing momentum.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will NVIDIA stock price exceed $150 by June 30, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Yahoo Finance, Nasdaq official closing price; simple spot NVDA closing.
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Memory shortage (DRAM/HBM) repricing consumer electronics (Hacker News top discussion) benefits semis, but NVIDIA's exposure to AI infrastructure + government stakes in Micron/quantum create hedging demand; tariff uncertainty discounts current prices.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: Hacker News: 'The memory shortage is causing a repricing of consumer electronics' + CNBC: 'U.S. government take stake' trend + CoinDesk: 'IREN co-founder says AI's biggest bottleneck is infrastructure, not chips.'

investment_theses.thesis: Warsh Fed + Trump tariff refunds + declining Treasury supply (bond repricing) drive near-term equity risk premium compression; overweight tech/semis, underweight long-duration bonds.
supporting_signals: CNBC: 'Trump said he'd remember companies that didn't apply for tariff refunds. Many of them are anyway' (Walmart case signals capex reallocation).
CNBC: 'Surge in risk-free treasury yields sends bond investors in search of better opportunities' (curve steepening, duration hedge unwinding).
CoinDesk: 'Tom Lee says trillions in tech IPO supply won't crash the S&P 500' (structural bid narrative).
investment_theses.counter_view: Iran escalation + recession fears could trigger demand destruction in oil/consumer, reversing tariff-relief rally; SpaceX IPO + tech supply overhang may depress tech valuations despite AI narrative.
investment_theses.expression: Long SPY or QQQ (or pair trade: long QQQ, short IEF mid-duration Treasuries); short TLT or long short-duration UST (SHY).

investment_theses.thesis: Oil supply/demand tightness (Iran war + 4-6 week inventory depletion runway) creates commodity upside into summer driving season; geopolitical risk premium and ICE/OKX oil futures retail access expand trading volume.
supporting_signals: CNBC: 'Iran war leaves U.S. gas prices at highest levels in nearly four years ahead of Memorial Day; Global oil inventories are declining fast with just four to six weeks until gasoline, diesel and jet fuel prices shoot higher.'
CoinDesk: 'OKX and ICE are bringing never-expiring oil futures to 120 million crypto users' (new liquidity, longer-tail trading).
CNBC: 'U.S., Iran signal peace progress — but remain at odds' (uncertainty premium, range-trading upside).
investment_theses.counter_view: Warsh rate cuts or recession fears could reverse demand, collapsing oil; peace agreement on uranium/tolls kills geopolitical premium.
investment_theses.expression: Long WTI crude (CL) or USO; long energy sector ETF (XLE); or long oil/short duration bonds (CL vs SHY).

investment_theses.thesis: Bitcoin consolidation near $77k, Warsh narrative + Trump crypto friendliness, and prediction market regulatory clarity (CNBC earnings calls) create optionality for breakout above $85k–$95k by Q3 2026; ETH/BTC bottoming on DeFi FUD.
supporting_signals: CoinDesk: 'Live markets: Bitcoin continues holding pattern near $77,000 ahead of Kevin Warsh taking over at Fed' (equilibrium position into policy clarity).
CNBC: 'Despite murky legal landscape, companies are undeterred in their prediction markets businesses' (regulatory tailwind, volatility compression).
Crypto trending: NEAR surges 19.4%; HYPE, ONDO, GRASS strength shows institutional + retail re-engagement.
Cointelegraph: 'DeFi hacks shake institutional confidence' (capitulation, valuation reset).
investment_theses.counter_view: Macro recession, Warsh tightening bias vs Trump, or major hack (THORChain pattern) could trigger BTC reversal below $70k.
investment_theses.expression: Long BTC spot or BTC perpetual (1-3x leverage); or long BTC/short SPY ratio (hedged equity tail risk); or long NEAR, HYPE (liquid altcoin proxies for infrastructure thesis).

investment_theses.thesis: Chinese AI hardware + EV (Xiaomi, battery/motor AI optimization) are accelerating faster than consensus; 36Kr stories signal localized momentum before English media adoption; YU7 delivery targets and physical AI deployment (贵州, 内蒙古 edge nodes) outpace Western AI capex.
supporting_signals: 36Kr: 'Xiaomi YU7 累计交付 [cumulative deliveries] 2025年7月至2026年4月' vs Tesla Model Y (sales comparison narrative emerging in Chinese media first).
36Kr: 'Chinese industrial physical AI density 12x global average, 2x power generation, dense 5G edge — enabling scale before US.' (江行智能 thesis).
36Kr: 'AI terminal ecosystem entering deep fusion → ecosystem stage; phone AI penetration 15%→40%, still +decision driver upside.' (consumer hardware refresh thesis).
FLAG: These stories surfaced in 36Kr before English tech media picked them up; signals upcoming NVDA/ASML repricing.
investment_theses.counter_view: US semiconductor export controls on China, Huawei restrictions, or tariff escalation could derail Chinese EV/AI hardware scaling; SMIC yield / process node delays.
investment_theses.expression: Long Chinese tech ETFs (KWEB, CQQQ); long TSMC (indirect exposure to Chinese AI chip demand); or direct long Xiaomi ADR (XIACF) if available; hedge with short SMH (if expecting China tech outperformance) or pair trade long KraneShares CSI Internet 100 vs short Nasdaq-100.

investment_theses.thesis: Memory chip shortage (DRAM/HBM) repricing creates upside for MU; US government equity stake in Micron likely by EOY 2026 (geopolitical + Trump capex policy); MU already benefiting from AI training/inference capex concentration.
supporting_signals: Hacker News: 'The memory shortage is causing a repricing of consumer electronics' (supply-constrained theme gaining attention).
CNBC: 'Which company will the U.S. government take a stake in next? Here's what traders think — IonQ, Micron and Anduril could be next.' (Kalshi bets live, official thesis).
CoinDesk: 'IREN co-founder says AI's biggest bottleneck is infrastructure, not chips' (indirect support: HBM/memory is the infrastructure constraint, not GPU compute).
investment_theses.counter_view: Memory oversupply by H2 2026 if AI capex moderates; government equity stake delays or doesn't materialize (regulatory/funding uncertainty).
investment_theses.expression: Long MU stock or call options (60–120 DTE); or long MU vs short SPX (relative upside); or long semiconductor ETF (SMH) with overweight via MU calls.
